name: Steve Wilson
abstract: Steve Wilson (born February 9, 1961) is an American jazz multi-instrumentalist, who is best known in the musical community as a flutist and an alto and soprano saxophonist. He also plays the clarinet and the piccolo.

about_quotes.speaker: Ray Vega
about_quotes.evidence: Steve Wilson, I was over at DePaul University working with some students over there but Steve Wilson, a great saxophonist came in and gave a master class that was awesome.

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Barron
about_quotes.evidence: Then, the thing with Steve – Steve Wilson played on a few tracks. He was an amazing saxophonist.
